note: Abu Hanifa and Malik were contemporaries
Malik was a teacher of al-Shafii
Al-Shafii was a teacher of Ahmad ibn Hanbal
Ahmad ibn Hanbal was a teacher of al-Bukhari
Al-Bukhari was a teacher of Muslim
Al-Bukhari was a teacher of at-Tirmidhi
Al-Bukhari and Abu Dawud were contemporaries
Ibn Taymiyyah was the teacher of Ibn al-Qayyim
Ibn Taymiyyah was the teacher of Ibn Kathir
Ibn al-Qayyim and Ibn Kathir were contemporaries and fellow students
An-Nawawi was a Shafii scholar influenced by al-Shafii
Ahmad ibn Hanbal's methodology strongly influenced Ibn Taymiyyah
Ibn Hajar and an-Nawawi were both major Shafii hadith scholars
Muslim's Sahih was a primary source for an-Nawawi's Sharh
